languages.text: "Как пожелаете, Лорд-капитан. Это будет опасное предприятие — все мы знаем, насколько нестабильны несанкционированные псайкеры. Однако уверен, Погонщицы перед таким пиром не устоят".
"As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."
languages.original_text: "Как пожелаете, Лорд-капитан. Это будет опасное предприятие — все мы знаем, насколько нестабильны несанкционированные псайкеры. Однако уверен, Погонщицы перед таким пиром не устоят".

traits.locale_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."
"As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."
"As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

languages.text: 「ご意向にございます、艦長様。危険な冒険になるでしょうが、我々は未承認のサイカーがいかに不安定であるかを知っています。しかし、ドルーバーはきっと、このような饗宴を拒むことはできないでしょう」
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

traits.locale_text: 「ご意向にございます、艦長様。危険な冒険になるでしょうが、我々は未承認のサイカーがいかに不安定であるかを知っています。しかし、ドルーバーはきっと、このような饗宴を拒むことはできないでしょう。」

languages.text: «Como desee, Lord Capitán. Será una empresa arriesgada, todos sabemos el peligro que conlleva un psíquico no autorizado. Sin embargo, seguro que los Pastores no se resisten a semejante festín».
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

traits.locale_text: «Como desee, Lord Capitán. Será una empresa arriesgada, todos sabemos el peligro que conlleva un psíquico no autorizado. Sin embargo, seguro que los Pastores no se resisten a semejante festín».

languages.text: “如您所愿，舰长大人。这会是一次危险的行动。非法灵能者有多不稳定，我们都清楚。但我确信，拒生花绝对无法抗拒这样一场盛宴。”
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿，舰长大人。这会是一次危险的行动。非法灵能者有多不稳定，我们都清楚。但我确信，拒生花绝对无法抗拒这样一场盛宴。”

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Lord Captain. Das wird ein gefährliches Unterfangen ... wir wissen alle, wie instabil unsanktionierte Psioniker sind. Aber ich bin sicher, die Treiber werden einem derartigen Festmahl nicht widerstehen können."
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Lord Captain. Das wird ein gefährliches Unterfangen ... wir wissen alle, wie instabil unsanktionierte Psioniker sind. Aber ich bin sicher, die Treiber werden einem derartigen Festmahl nicht widerstehen können."

languages.text: "Nasıl isterseniz Lord Kaptan. Tehlikeli bir girişim olacak... Onaysız ruhsezerlerin ne kadar dengesiz olduğunu hepimiz biliyoruz. Ancak Çobanların böyle bir ziyafete karşı koyamayacağından eminim."
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl isterseniz Lord Kaptan. Tehlikeli bir girişim olacak... Onaysız ruhsezerlerin ne kadar dengesiz olduğunu hepimiz biliyoruz. Ancak Çobanların böyle bir ziyafete karşı koyamayacağından eminim."

languages.text: « Comme il vous plaira, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. C'est une entreprise risquée. Nous savons combien les psykers non assermentés peuvent être instables. Cela dit, les Chasseurs ne pourront certainement pas résister à un tel festin. »
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Lord Captain. It will be a dangerous venture — we all know how unstable unsanctioned psykers are. However, I'm sure the Drovers will not be able to resist such a feast."
